subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the presence of One Who is mighty and powerful, and verily it is the Most Great Cause amidst all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن مقتدر قدیرا و انه لسبب الاعظم بین الخلایق جمیعا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Manifestation of God as sun, @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
